title: App review note on fragmented workflow context
claim: Users value connected delivery visibility but still feel strategy, communication, and decision context live outside the core tool.
source_snippet: Great for tracking delivery, but we still end up stitching the broader picture together elsewhere.
implication: ProductOS can differentiate by connecting research, decisions, and communication around delivery systems.
unknowns: How representative is this pain across teams not already committed to Atlassian workflows?
followup_questions: Does this pain appear more in leadership reporting or day-to-day PM execution?
